indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for ample movement and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga practice.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture could make it difficult to find a comfortable spot for stretching.

reasoning_summary: The space is suitable for yoga and stretching due to its large open area and natural lighting, but lacks furniture for comfort.
